title: miserable
author: corbin
body:
i barely even date. like almost never. but honestly the whole concept of
love is just complete bullshit anyway. whenever you get into a relationship
you just stop feeling like a real person. you just turn into this hollow
shell that exists only to try and please the other person. you just mirror
them and do whatever they want so they wont leave you. it's exhausting.

my first gf figured that out real quick. she manipulated the fuck out of me. she got me to do things im so fucking ashamed of now. i just completely humiliated myself because i thought that was what you were
supposed to do when you cared about someone and wanted them to stay. i look
back at the shit i let her talk me into and the way i let her treat me and
i just feel
so
fucking
stupid.
i regret it all. it just makes me hate myself even more than i already do.
and then my most recent girlfriend just completely abandoned me over the dumbest shit. she broke up with me because of my sleep schedule. my fucking sleep schedule. because i stay up late and sleep during the day and don't have a "normal routine" or whatever. like really? you throw away an entire relationship because i'm awake at night? i genuinely don't understand it at all. i don't understand what people actually want from me.
it just proves my point though. love isn't real. it's just two people using each other until one of them gets bored or finds a petty excuse to bail.
